markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new team members to customer pain points and core use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Customer Pain Point:** VC-backed firms get stuck after exhausting paid search headroom. They need repeatable organic growth to meet aggressive targets, often under pressure from CMOs with \~1-year tenures.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [**Our Value Prop:** Provide "speed to signal" by rapidly testing hypotheses and delivering data. This accelerates customer learning cycles and helps them demonstrate value before their CMO's tenure ends.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [**Core Strategy:** Start with editorial content to build deep business/persona understanding. This foundation informs all subsequent work, including programmatic SEO and content repurposing.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Key Tactic:** Use a `/guides` subfolder to bypass slow client blog processes. This creates a dedicated, fast-moving surface area for testing without diluting the client's thought leadership content.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)

## Topics

### The Customer Problem: Stuck After Paid Search

  - [Our customers are VC-backed firms needing repeatable growth to hit aggressive targets.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [They start with paid search for its predictable modeling but quickly hit its natural headroom (limited search volume).](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [This leaves them stuck, unable to scale beyond demand capture.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [**The CMO Pressure Cooker:**](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
      - [Average CMO tenure is \~1 year.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
      - [A typical organic growth cycle (assessment → quick wins → data validation) consumes most of this time.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
      - [This creates intense pressure to show results fast, making "speed to signal" our core value.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)

### Our Solution: A Phased Approach

  - [We start with editorial content (high-quality articles) to build a deep understanding of the client's business and personas.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [This foundation informs all subsequent work, ensuring strategic alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [We then layer on other services, like programmatic SEO (PSEO), as the client's program matures.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Note:** We avoid one-off projects and highly custom work, which have historically been unprofitable.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)

### Use Case 1: Programmatic SEO (PSEO)

  - [**Definition:** Template-based content creation to capture long-tail search intent at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [**Our Role:** We build the PSEO system from scratch for clients, as they rarely have one.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
      - [This includes template design, data sourcing, and technical implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
  - [**Example: Ramp Per Diem Calculator**](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** High search volume for per diem rates, with poor user experiences from government sites.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
      - [**Solution:** Scraped government data to build a superior, interactive calculator.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
      - [**Result:** Created a scalable template for hundreds of city-specific pages.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
  - [**Example: Vapi Use Cases**](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Vapi (voice AI) lacked clarity on its own use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
      - [**Solution:** Analyzed Vapi's data to identify \~3,000 use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
      - [**Result:** Built a PSEO system to create pages for each use case, including a forkable system prompt for the Vapi tool.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)

### Use Case 2: The `/guides` Subfolder Tactic

  - [**Problem:** Client blog processes are often slow, hindering our ability to test and learn quickly.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [**Solution:** Create a dedicated `/guides` subfolder on the client's site.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This provides a fast-moving surface area for our content, separate from the client's thought leadership blog.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [**Goal:** Enable rapid testing and learning without diluting the client's core brand voice.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)

### Use Case 3: Content Repurposing

  - [**Strategy:** Extend the life and reach of existing client assets (e.g., webinars, podcasts).](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [**Example: Galileo Podcast Repurposing**](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
      - [**Process:** Transcribed a weekly podcast into a detailed article.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
      - [**Result:** Created a more engaging experience by offering both video and a scannable article, increasing content accessibility.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nigel & Andrea:** Review the onboarding deck for more details.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [**Nigel & Andrea:** Reach out to Kyle with any follow-up questions.](https://fathom.video/share/tWqrDF8x8DxT6AL3rQzRot4zZdxyvreR?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
